name: Ged Raish
description:
__Race:__ Human
__Age:__ Around 20
__Height:__ 177 cm (5'10")
__Affiliation:__ Unknown Familia
__Level:__ 1
Deceased

A former member of the Soma Familia. Ged showed little concern or patience for anyone who slowed him down from completing a quest or killing monsters. This was evident through his attitude toward Lili, calling her useless and even threatening to use her as a decoy. 

(Source: Danmachi Wiki)
